en: What else I can do?
ko: 내가 무엇을 더 할 수 있을까?

en: To assist you, you mean?
Some silence right now would be marvellous.
You know, because you're an idiot.
No, no, no, don't even think about it.
Anderson, don't talk out loud.
You lower the IQ of the whole street.
ko: 너 때문에 거리 전체의 IQ가 떨어져.

en: We should call the police. Yes.
On the way. Do you like it?
Erm, no.
The German for revenge. She couldn't be trying to help herself.
ko: 복수에 대한 독일어. 그녀는 스스로를 도우려는 게 아닐까?

en: Yes, thank you for your input.
She's cleverer than you lot, and she's dead.
Shut up. What are you saying?
You were thinking.
It's annoying.
Oh, John, I envy you so much.
You envy me.
Your mind is so placid, straightforward, barely used.
ko: 너의 마음은 너무 평온하고, 직설적이며, 거의 사용되지 않아.

en: What are you typing? Blog.
About? Us. You mean us.
ko: 주제는? 우리. 너는 우리를 말하는 거지.

en: Mine.
Well, you're typing a lot.
Brilliant, Anderson.
Yes, brilliant impression of an idiot. I don't see.
ko: 응, 바보의 훌륭한 인상. 나는 잘 모르겠어.

en: You see, you just don't observe.
All right, all right, girls, calm down.
